SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut.ctg

Class TcpSupernautGateway

java.lang.Object
com.nib.supernaut.ctg.TcpSupernautGateway
All Implemented Interfaces:
GatewayReturnCodes, ISupernautGateway
public class TcpSupernautGateway extends Object implements ISupernautGateway
TcpSupernautGateway is an implementation of the ISupernautGateway interface, providing TCP-based communication capabilities for interacting with Supernaut Transaction Gateway service. This class supports secure connections using SSL/TLS and maintains a pool of sockets for communication. It is designed to manage request flow, connection handling, and error reporting during communication with remote transaction systems.

  • Constructor Details

    • TcpSupernautGateway

      public TcpSupernautGateway()
      Default constructor for the TcpSupernautGateway class. This constructor initializes a new instance of the TcpSupernautGateway without any specific configuration.

    • TcpSupernautGateway

      public TcpSupernautGateway(String host, int port, Properties sslProperties)
      Constructs a new TcpSupernautGateway instance using the provided parameters.
      Parameters:
      host - the hostname or IP address of the gateway
      port - the port number to connect to
      sslProperties - the SSL properties used for secure connections

    • TcpSupernautGateway

      public TcpSupernautGateway(String host, int port)
      Constructs a new instance of TcpSupernautGateway with the specified hostname and port.
      Parameters:
      host - the hostname or IP address of the gateway to connect to
      port - the port number to use for the connection

  • Method Details

    • flow

      public int flow(ECIRequest eciRequest) throws IOException
      Executes the flow operation based on the given ECIRequest and handles communication with the Transaction Gateway.
      Specified by:
      flow in interface ISupernautGateway
      Parameters:
      eciRequest - the ECIRequest object containing the necessary request details, such as program name, Commarea data, user credentials, and synchronization settings.
      Returns:
      an integer indicating the result of the operation. Returns 0 for successful operations, or an error code corresponding to a specific failure condition.
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs during communication with the Transaction Gateway or while connecting to the socket.

    • connect

      protected CtgSocket connect() throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

    • isOpen

      public boolean isOpen()
      Checks if the TCP connection or resource is currently open.
      Specified by:
      isOpen in interface ISupernautGateway
      Returns:
      true if the connection or resource is open; false otherwise.

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes all active sockets associated with this instance and clears the internal list of sockets.
      Specified by:
      close in interface ISupernautGateway
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if an IOException occurs while closing any socket

    • getHostname

      public String getHostname()
      Retrieves the hostname based on the value of the URL field. If the URL is null, the method returns null. If the URL starts with "local:", the method returns "localhost". If the URL starts with "tcp:", the method trims the "tcp:" prefix and returns the remaining part of the URL. In other cases, the method returns the value of the URL field directly.
      Returns:
      the hostname derived from the URL field, or null if the URL is null

    • connectSsl

      protected SSLSocket connectSsl() throws IOException, NoSuchAlgorithmException, KeyStoreException, KeyManagementException, CertificateException
      Throws:
      IOException
      NoSuchAlgorithmException
      KeyStoreException
      KeyManagementException
      CertificateException
